Peter, I'll keep this short.

It's the end of July and we're just hours away from an important fundraising deadline.

In addition, the first Republican debate is next week, and I'd like to show up in Cleveland in a strong position, knowing that we've hit all of our goals.

[**Will you take 2 minutes to help out and make a contribution to my campaign?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29439944:28240200413:m:1:876315805:611921F8A6E7BB989487467903F5AE45:r)

Big or small, it all adds up -- and I would be extremely grateful.

Thank you for your ongoing commitment and generosity.

Together, we're going to make history.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**P.S.** I'm told that our new, official campaign hats are a big hit. [If you haven't gotten one yet, you can do so now by making a donation of $22.16 or more](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29439945:28240200413:m:1:876315805:611921F8A6E7BB989487467903F5AE45:r).

name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm afraid it has come to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Time is running out. The U.S. Senate's vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood will come down to the wire.

And the Abortion Lobby is fighting back with everything they have to ensure they keep their bloody hands on our tax dollars.

That's why I'm launching an immediate DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb to help me turn up the heat on my allies in Congress.

**[Will you chip in $20.16 or more right away to give us the best chance to pass my bill to finally strip Planned Parenthood of every dime of our tax dollars before the August recess](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29430032:28242485229:m:1:879035888:EBE35E29E6CC8A557882F16A3A3237AA:r)**?

Your generosity will help me contact even more Americans and mobilize them to turn up the heat on the U.S. Senate.

**[It will also help me run this brand-new TV ad in the days leading up to the vote](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29430032:28242485229:m:1:879035888:EBE35E29E6CC8A557882F16A3A3237AA:r)**.

But I need you to act now.

Lower level courts are now attempting to bar the release of any more undercover videos exposing Planned Parenthood until well after the United States Senate votes on my legislation to defund Planned Parenthood next week!

And Planned Parenthood attorneys are working overtime to prevent news stations from showing the videos that have already been released!

I'm sure the Abortion Lobby's allies in the press will be all too willing to comply.

You and I simply MUST turn up the pressure NOW -- before it's too late.

With Congress' power of the purse, this is one fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House.

Fellow Conservative, the stakes are getting higher by the minute.

Planned Parenthood's President is calling anyone who opposes their horrific practice of killing unborn babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit "extremists!"

My jaw hit the floor when I read those words.

After the videos that have been released over the past few weeks, the American people know who the real extremists are.

They've seen the ugly reality behind Planned Parenthood -- the nation's largest abortion provider -- with these gut-wrenching videos showing:

*** Dr. Deborah Nucatola, Planned Parenthood's leading abortionist, discussing how she skirts federal law to perform partial birth abortions, and uses special care when aborting babies to be preserve their organs for sale -- all while munching a salad;

*** Another Planned Parenthood Executive joking "I want a Lamborghini" while discussing the price of unborn baby parts;

*** A Planned Parenthood worker admitting she nearly passed out when she was asked to dissect a freshly-aborted baby -- and another shouting "five stars" as a worker announced she found intact kidneys after picking through aborted baby parts;

Fellow Conservative, this organization deserves our scorn, not our tax dollars.

And if pro-abortion Democrats in the United States Senate truly want to support this madness, I believe they'll pay a HUGE price at the polls.

I know I've asked a lot of you over the past several days since this story broke.

But thanks to your support and action, I've been able to secure a vote before the U.S. Senate's recess on August 7th.

Now, it's time to WIN.

Studies show that more tax dollars equals more abortion.

So stripping Planned Parenthood of our tax dollars will save lives.

Not only that, but it will set the stage for even more victories with the election of a pro-life President.

But none of this will happen without your support.

**[Please chip in right away so I can mobilize millions of Americans from all over the country through mass emails, TV, radio and Internet ads](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29430032:28242485229:m:1:879035888:EBE35E29E6CC8A557882F16A3A3237AA:r)**.

Planned Parenthood is attempting to squash the release of more videos.

They're doing everything they can to shut up the press.

But they can't shut you and me up. Not if we keep fighting with everything we have.

I believe this vote will come down to the wire.

Please chip in your gift of $20.16 or more right away. Please help me mobilize as many Americans as possible to this critical fight.

I'm counting on your action.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29430033:28242485229:m:1:879035888:EBE35E29E6CC8A557882F16A3A3237AA:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

name: Elizabeth Conatser, Finance Director, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Fwd: Interactive Conference Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016
body:
Friend, I hope you are able to join the call this afternoon.

[**To sign up for the call, please make an instant online donation of $25 or more right now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29443460:28245597215:m:1:877327319:EF9B89CD2358BB99CA76594BC066ED45:r) After your donation you will receive the details for the interactive conference call with Senator Lindsey Graham.

Elizabeth Conatser
Finance Director
Lindsey Graham 2016

| |

---
---
|
Friend,

Let's talk on Friday.

I'm running for president to keep our country safe and preserve the American Dream. **It's time for a Commander-in-Chief who is ready and willing to confront our enemies and keep America secure on Day One.**

I am ready to do just that, but I cannot get to the White House without your immediate support. [**This Friday, I will be hosting an interactive conference call for my supporters who contribute $25 or more right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29443460:28245597215:m:1:877327319:EF9B89CD2358BB99CA76594BC066ED45:r)

**After you donate $25 or more, you will be directed to the details for a Supporter-Only conference call this Friday, July 31st at 4:00pm EST.**

Call participants are encouraged to ask questions about my campaign, the critical issues facing our nation, and even about funny topics like [my response to Donald Trump giving out my cell phone number on national television.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29443461:28245597215:m:1:877327319:EF9B89CD2358BB99CA76594BC066ED45:r)

Friend, I cannot and will not win this election unless I have your support. [**Please follow this link to donate $25 or more right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29443460:28245597215:m:1:877327319:EF9B89CD2358BB99CA76594BC066ED45:r)

I hope to get a chance to talk with you on Friday. I truly enjoy hearing from friends like you.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

**P.S.[After your donation of $25 or more, you will be directed to the details for the interactive call on Friday.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29443460:28245597215:m:1:877327319:EF9B89CD2358BB99CA76594BC066ED45:r) If you know of friends who might want to contribute and participate in our Supporter-Only conference call, please forward this email to them. Thank you.** |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

subject: Planned Parenthood won't know what hit them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Planned Parenthood is working overtime to maintain their bloody grip on your tax dollars.

They are lobbying their allies in the press to censor the release of more videos and even ran to court to obtain a gag order on new videos being broadcast -- all to kill the growing momentum behind Senator Paul's bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

This battle will reach a boiling point in just a few days -- **[and your immediate support could decide whether or not the Senate passes Senator Paul's bill](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29446449:28250233011:m:1:879035888:22A7F080181D1C29B6E4FBA3F3AD46E1:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, Senator Paul secured a vote on his Defund Planned Parenthood bill for one reason: the overwhelming support of MILLIONS of Americans just like you.

And with your continued support, Senator Paul plans to spread this brand new hard-hitting TV ad across the country to whip up a grassroots firestorm and turn up the heat on the U.S. Senate.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29446449:28250233011:m:1:879035888:22A7F080181D1C29B6E4FBA3F3AD46E1:r)

This vote will come down to the wire.

Senator Paul is laying everything on the line for this fight. Will you help him?

With Congress' power of the purse, this is a vote we can WIN \-- even with President Obama in the White House!

**[But you and I simply MUST turn up the pressure NOW](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29446449:28250233011:m:1:879035888:22A7F080181D1C29B6E4FBA3F3AD46E1:r)** \-- before it's too late.

Please see Senator Paul's email below on why your immediate action is critical at this time.

In Liberty,

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President

\---------- Begin Forwarded Message ----------

**Subject** : I'm afraid it has come to this
**From** : Rand Paul [rand.paul@randpaul2016.com]
**To** : Fellow Conservative

Fellow Conservative:

Time is running out. The U.S. Senate's vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood will come down to the wire.

And the Abortion Lobby is fighting back with everything they have to ensure they keep their bloody hands on our tax dollars.

That's why I'm launching an immediate DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb to help me turn up the heat on my allies in Congress.

**[Will you chip in $20.16 or more right away to give us the best chance to pass my bill to finally strip Planned Parenthood of every dime of our tax dollars before the August recess](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29446449:28250233011:m:1:879035888:22A7F080181D1C29B6E4FBA3F3AD46E1:r)**?

Your generosity will help me contact even more Americans and mobilize them to turn up the heat on the U.S. Senate.

**[It will also help me run this brand-new TV ad in the days leading up to the vote](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29446449:28250233011:m:1:879035888:22A7F080181D1C29B6E4FBA3F3AD46E1:r)**.

But I need you to act now.

Lower level courts are now attempting to bar the release of any more undercover videos exposing Planned Parenthood until well after the United States Senate votes on my legislation to defund Planned Parenthood next week!

And Planned Parenthood attorneys are working overtime to prevent news stations from showing the videos that have already been released!

I'm sure the Abortion Lobby's allies in the press will be all too willing to comply.

You and I simply MUST turn up the pressure NOW -- before it's too late.

With Congress' power of the purse, this is one fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House.

Fellow Conservative, the stakes are getting higher by the minute.

Planned Parenthood's President is calling anyone who opposes their horrific practice of killing unborn babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit "extremists!"

My jaw hit the floor when I read those words.

After the videos that have been released over the past few weeks, the American people know who the real extremists are.

They've seen the ugly reality behind Planned Parenthood -- the nation's largest abortion provider -- with these gut-wrenching videos showing:

*** Dr. Deborah Nucatola, Planned Parenthood's leading abortionist, discussing how she skirts federal law to perform partial birth abortions, and uses special care when aborting babies to be preserve their organs for sale -- all while munching a salad;

*** Another Planned Parenthood Executive joking "I want a Lamborghini" while discussing the price of unborn baby parts;

*** A Planned Parenthood worker admitting she nearly passed out when she was asked to dissect a freshly-aborted baby -- and another shouting "five stars" as a worker announced she found intact kidneys after picking through aborted baby parts;

Fellow Conservative, this organization deserves our scorn, not our tax dollars.

And if pro-abortion Democrats in the United States Senate truly want to support this madness, I believe they'll pay a HUGE price at the polls.

I know I've asked a lot of you over the past several days since this story broke.

But thanks to your support and action, I've been able to secure a vote before the U.S. Senate's recess on August 7th.

Now, it's time to WIN.

Studies show that more tax dollars equals more abortion.

So stripping Planned Parenthood of our tax dollars will save lives.

Not only that, but it will set the stage for even more victories with the election of a pro-life President.

But none of this will happen without your support.

**[Please chip in right away so I can mobilize millions of Americans from all over the country through mass emails, TV, radio and Internet ads](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29446449:28250233011:m:1:879035888:22A7F080181D1C29B6E4FBA3F3AD46E1:r)**.

Planned Parenthood is attempting to squash the release of more videos.

They're doing everything they can to shut up the press.

But they can't shut you and me up. Not if we keep fighting with everything we have.

I believe this vote will come down to the wire.

Please chip in your gift of $20.16 or more right away. Please help me mobilize as many Americans as possible to this critical fight.

I'm counting on your action.

Rand Paul

name: Van Hollen HQ
subject: Been telling you all week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
**BREAKING from POLITICO: Koch Brother groups want a "dark-money" makeover.
[Help us fight back against special interest money. Give $5 now to help Chris build a people-powered campaign and win in 2016!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/3953260/3228617970/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_1nd&amount=5.00")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/3953263/3228617970/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_1d&amount=25.00")Friend -- We've been telling you all week how Chris is fighting to keep shadowy corporations and special interests from drowning out the voices of grassroots supporters, and this story from Politico is just another reason why we need you.

Koch Brothers-backed groups, the same ones that brought you oppressive voter ID laws and "stand your ground," want to rebrand their corrosive dark money tactics so they sound just a little less...shady.

Who are they kidding? Just because you slap a new name on dark money doesn't change what it is: a handful of billionaires and corporate special interests drowning out the voices of voters.

Chris has always led the fight to keep dark money out of our elections, and he won't stand idly by while voters are silenced. **But he needs you by his side to fight back and win in 2016. Can you chip in and help?**

**[Click here to give $5 or more to build a people-powered campaign and win in 2016!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/3953260/3228617970/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_1nd&amount=5.00")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/395327d/3228617970/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em073115_1nd")** **[Donate $10 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/395327a/3228617970/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em073115_1nd")** **[Donate $25 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/395327b/3228617970/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em073115_1nd")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/3953278/3228617970/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_1nd")** Chris is leading the fight against special interest money right here in Maryland. Just a few weeks ago, following the example set by Elizabeth Warren, Chris offered a progressive "Free State Pledge" that would keep special interest money out of our election.

But our opponent flatly rejected the pledge, despite claiming to be an advocate for rolling back Citizens United and the influence of dark money in elections.

If Democrats are going to take back the Senate and fight against the shadowy forces unleashed by Citizens United, then we need an effective progressive champion who stands on principle and leads by example. That's what Chris has done since day one.

**[Will you show him you have his back? Click here to pitch in $5 or more and help Chris build a people-powered campaign and win in 2016!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e80/70cdc2ba/47902f21/3953260/3228617970/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_1nd&amount=5.00")**

\- Team Van Hollen

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

subject: They want you to think this picture is impossible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
I believe that we will win, friend.
On Wednesday night, over 100,000 supporters gathered at 3,500 events across the country to kick off the Bernie 2016 organizing effort. It was an unprecedented grassroots gathering this early in a presidential campaign.
And earlier this week, we received some tremendous polling news from CNN. Check out these two potential general election match-ups:
Bernie Sanders (D): 48% | | Bernie Sanders (D): 48%
---|---|---
Scott Walker (R): 42% | | Jeb Bush (R): 47%
Bernie has more than tripled his support in the Democratic primary since our April 30th launch, and he is the ONLY Democratic candidate with higher favorable ratings than unfavorable.
**We told everyone they should not underestimate us, but we still have a lot of work left to do.**
[**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 2016 today, and help fund the movement needed to win the presidential election.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20c9/43f17890/5d05337c/621d5f11/1476760713/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/presidential-polls?refcode=em150731d")
When this campaign started, people said it was impossible -- that we were dreaming. But it's not: this is happening. Right now. Because of you. And if we keep it up, it won't be too difficult for anyone to imagine seeing this on November 8, 2016.
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20c9/43f17890/5d05337c/621d5f11/1476760713/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/presidential-polls?refcode=em150731d")
Like Bernie says: "Now is not the time to think small."
We have our sights set high, but if we stand together and continue to grow, there's nothing we can't accomplish. [**And your contribution today will help get us there.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20c9/43f17890/5d05337c/621d5f11/1476760713/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/presidential-polls?refcode=em150731d")
Thanks for adding one,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20c9/43f17890/5d05337c/621d5f11/1476760713/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/presidential-polls?refcode=em150731d")

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Join me and become a card-carrying member of Team Hillary. | Friend --

I am so excited for Hillary Clinton to be the next President of the United States. I've endorsed her -- I'll do whatever I can to help her win the White House -- and now I've signed up to get my official Team Hillary supporter card. (Call me a nerd, but I'm excited about that, too.)

**[You can get your supporter card, too, for a limited time only -- chip in $1 before midnight to get yours in the mail.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMxNzIxMTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAzMDg0MzQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I love having conversations with people about why I support Hillary. I'm looking forward to taking my supporter card out of my wallet and talking about Hillary's views on issues like immigration and criminal justice reform, and how she really gets issues that disproportionately affect young people and people of color.

You're here standing with Hillary from the beginning, so I want you to have your own supporter card to show off to your friends and family. Don't miss out!

**Chip in $1 before midnight tonight to get your limited-edition supporter card -- I bet it 'll make you smile every time you see it:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/supporter-card](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMxNzIxMTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAzMDg0MzQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Cory Booker

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Will we come up short?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Two days.

That's how long you and I have to turn up the pressure on the Senate to pass my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

Without your immediate action, I'm afraid we could come up short, and my new hard-hitting pro-Life TV ad won't reach the airwaves.

**[So please chip in an emergency contribution of $20.16 to my DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29452902:28256231866:m:1:879035888:C5C4536BFD299A34F98917D789861822:r)**.

Planned Parenthood's lobbying machine is working overtime to shut up and shut down their opposition in the critical days leading up to Monday's vote.

They're begging courts to put gag orders on releasing new videos.

They've hired one of Washington's top Democratic PR firms in a desperate attempt to suppress coverage of the undercover videos.

And just yesterday, Planned Parenthood's President launched a vicious attack campaign, calling anyone who dares to oppose their horrific practice of killing unborn babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit "extremists!"

Meanwhile, from Hillary Clinton to the White House, Planned Parenthood's allies on Capitol Hill are rallying to their side -- vowing to defeat my bill to strip them of taxpayer funding.

Fellow Conservative, you and I are facing powerful and vicious opponents. This fight won't be easy.

But the majority of Americans are flat-out disgusted with Planned Parenthood.

And they're outraged about the over half a BILLION in taxpayer dollars funneled to Planned Parenthood year in and year out.

If pro-abortion Democrats in the Senate dare vote against my bill, they'll likely run into a buzz saw at the polls in 2016.

That's why the hard-hitting TV, radio, and Internet ads my campaign prepared -- along with the millions of emails we'll be sending -- are so critical.

**[And it's why I'm counting on you to please make a contribution of $20.16 to my DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD Money Bomb](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29452902:28256231866:m:1:879035888:C5C4536BFD299A34F98917D789861822:r)**.

With only two days, this is the quickest and most effective way to whip up the grassroots firestorm it's going to take to dial up the heat on the Senate enough to pass my bill.

Fellow Conservative, I believe this vote will come down to the wire.

The clock is running out.

Please chip in your gift of $20.16 or more right away.

Please help me mobilize as many Americans as possible to this critical fight.

Thank you in advance for your support.

subject: Again and again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Since Republicans took control of the Senate we have just seen irresponsible political games and brinkmanship. This week has been no exception: Friend -

Since Republicans took control of the Senate we have just seen irresponsible political games and brinkmanship. This week has been no exception:
* We are within 12 legislative days of another government shutdown, and Republican leaders haven't lifted a finger to do anything about it (again)
* The Tea Party is on the warpath against women's health and working to defund Planned Parenthood (again)
* Right-wingers wasted everyone's time attempting to kill the Affordable Care Act (again)

**And that was just THIS WEEK!**

We know what you're thinking: Democrats HAVE to take back the Senate. That's why we need just 200 more grassroots donations before midnight to meet our aggressive goal and continue to build a people-powered campaign that puts an effective, progressive leader in the U.S. Senate.

**We 're so close to reaching our goal! Can you chip in and help put us over the top?**

**[Click here to chip in $5 or more to help Chris win and take back the Senate in 2016!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/3953016/440196943/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_2nd&amount=5.00")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/3953019/440196943/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_2d&amount=25.00") ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ****[Donate $3 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/3953013/440196943/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em073115_2nd")**** ****[Donate $10 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/3953010/440196943/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em073115_2nd")**** ****[Donate $25 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/3953011/440196943/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em073115_2nd")**** ****[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/395302e/440196943/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_2nd")**** All along, Chris has been fighting for the values we care about. He was a key member of the leadership team that passed Wall Street reform and the Affordable Care Act -- the very thing Republicans are constantly trying to tear down.

And just last month, he sponsored a bill to help states set up licensing programs for handgun purchasers, something the _Washington Post_ called "a sensible, state-based answer to gun violence."

Chris doesn't just talk a big game; he delivers for us time and again. And now we need your help to deliver a key Democratic victory in 2016.

**[Will you give $5 or more today to help Chris win and take back the Senate?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e8c/70cdc2ba/4790bebe/3953016/440196943/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073115_2nd&amount=5.00")**

Thanks for pitching in,

Team Van Hollen

subject: Fwd: How do you eat a rhinoceros?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw Bobby's email -- this is an important deadline for the campaign, and [it would mean a lot to me if you were able to add your name to the list of today's donors](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMxNzUyMjQS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjIwMDA1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0).

I have never seen my husband waver from his beliefs, and I know he will never waver from doing what is right for our country. [Stand with him in this fight today.](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMxNzUyMjQS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjIwMDA1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you

Supriya Jindal
Sent from my iPhone

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Bobby (campaign)** <[bobby@bobbyjindalhq.com](mailto:info@bobbyjindalhq.com)>
Date: July 31, 2015 10:11:19 AM
Subject: How do you eat a rhinoceros?
To: Supriya (personal)

_Answer_ : one bite at a time.

This is something I tell my children when they worry over a project for school that seems too large -- they feel overwhelmed. **The key to any big project is to plan small bite-sized goals. You work toward that goal, and then set a new goal and work towards that.**

My wife had to remind me of this when we were planning our campaign. Running for President is a monumental task. Yet, if we break our plan into small goals and work tirelessly, _anything is possible._

Right now, we are focused on our fundraising goal for July. Your support has been amazing, and we are close to reaching our goal -- [but we need your help to propel this campaign forward](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMxNzUyMjQS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjIwMDA1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0).

Will you make a donation of [$500, $250, $100, or even $50](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxNzUyMjQS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjIwMDA1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0) before midnight tonight?

I am confident that we will reach this goal, and move to the next step in our plan. [We need your help before we can get there](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMxNzUyMjQS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjIwMDA1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0).

[Please make your donation today.](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMxNzUyMjQS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjIwMDA1Mjc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

God Bless,

Bobby Jindal

Paid for by Jindal For President
